_note: These segments are LIVE in the org (all ACTIVE, 0 members until data streams sync)

_format_notes.key_qualifier_required: SELECT must include KQ_Id__c alongside the primary key
_format_notes.no_joins: Segment SQL cannot JOIN to other DMOs
_format_notes.standard_dmos_only: Custom DMOs like ContactProfile__dlm are not recognized by segment engine
_format_notes.materialized_columns_only: Only columns returned by SELECT * FROM dmo LIMIT 1 are usable

segments.sql: SELECT ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c, ssot__Individual__dlm.KQ_Id__c FROM ssot__Individual__dlm WHERE ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__TitleName__c IS NOT NULL

SELECT ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c, ssot__Individual__dlm.KQ_Id__c FROM ssot__Individual__dlm WHERE ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__TitleName__c IS NOT NULL AND ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__LastName__c IS NOT NULL
SELECT ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Id__c, ssot__Account__dlm.KQ_Id__c FROM ssot__Account__dlm WHERE ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__AnnualRevenueAmount__c > 1000000
SELECT ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Id__c, ssot__Account__dlm.KQ_Id__c FROM ssot__Account__dlm WHERE ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__PrimaryIndustry__c = 'Technology'
SELECT ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Id__c, ssot__Account__dlm.KQ_Id__c FROM ssot__Account__dlm WHERE ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Name__c IS NOT NULL
